channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: LeBron and son Bronny James play together for the first time in a preseason game for the Lakers
item.description: PALM DESERT, Calif. (AP) — LeBron James grew up without a father, and the top scorer in NBA history has often said he savors every moment and milestone he can experience with his own three children.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Samoa warns of 'highly probable' fuel spill after New Zealand navy ship caught fire and sank
item.description: A fuel spill is “highly probable” after a New Zealand navy ship grounded, caught fire and sank off the coast of Samoa, the Pacific island nation's acting prime minister said late Sunday.
item.dc:creator: CHARLOTTE GRAHAM-McLAY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: US court to review civil rights lawsuit alleging environmental racism in a Louisiana parish
item.description: The Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals in New Orleans is set to hear arguments in a civil rights lawsuit alleging a south Louisiana parish engaged in racist land-use policies that placed polluting industries in majority-Black communities.
item.dc:creator: Jack Brook, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Florida prepares for massive evacuations as Hurricane Milton takes aim at major metro areas
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Florida (AP) — Florida is gearing up for what could be its biggest evacuation in seven years as Hurricane Milton strengthens over warm waters and heads toward major population centers including Tampa and Orlando.
item.dc:creator: JEFF MARTIN and FREIDA FRISARO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New analysis suggests national debt could increase under Harris, but it would surge under Trump
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — No one is likely to be happy with the projected higher deficits laid out in a new analysis of Kamala Harris' and Donald Trump's economic plans.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Nibi the 'diva' beaver won't be released, Massachusetts governor decides
item.description: The question of whether a 2-year-old beaver named Nibi can stay with the rescuers she has known since she was a baby or must be released into the wild has been resolved, thanks to the governor of Massachusetts.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Walmart will be closed on Thanksgiving Day for 5th consecutive year
item.description: Walmart will be closed on Thanksgiving Day for the fifth year in a row, the retail giant recently announced in its holiday plans.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, ABC 4

item.title: Tennessee nurse and his dog died trying to save a man from floods driven by Helene
item.description: “I’ve never had anyone risk their life for me,” David Boutin, the man Boone McCrary had set out to rescue said. “From what I hear that was the way he always been. He’s my guardian angel, that’s for sure.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Fires at home and abroad fuel anxieties in campaign homestretch
item.description: A series of turbulent events have left Democrats feeling hopeful but anxious a month out from November’s elections, with races for the House and White House too close to call.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lillis, NewsNation

item.title: Voters in North Carolina and Georgia have bigger problems than politics. Helene changed everything
item.description: VILAS, N.C. (AP) — Brad Farrington pulls over to grab a case of water bottles being passed out in Vilas, a small rural community tucked away in the Blue Ridge Mountains. He’s on his way to help a friend who lost much of what he owned when Hurricane Helene blew through last weekend.
item.dc:creator: MAKIYA SEMINERA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Here's what Spirit Halloween seeks in an 'ideal' retail location
item.description: Spirit Halloween made headlines earlier this week after firing back at "SNL" over a sketch that mocked the company's choice of retail locations.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: Can you stop calls and texts from political campaigns?
item.description: If you've received a political text or call recently, you may be wondering how to make it stop, or what you can do to prevent them in the future.
item.dc:creator: Samantha Jarpe, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: See the 10 most – and least – valuable college majors: study
item.description: A new study from financial publisher Bankrate found that STEM college majors dominate the ranking of valuable fields of study – but money isn't the only consideration.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, Fox 5

item.title: Hurricane Milton growing stronger as it approaches Florida: NHC
item.description: Milton has strengthed into a hurricane in the Gulf of Mexico, according to the National Hurricane Center.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Couple reunited after volunteer rescue pilot threatened with arrest in North Carolina
item.description: Jordan Seidhom, who decided to go help those impacted by Helene with his own helicopter on his own dime, was able to rescue Susan Coffey off a mountainside. But, before he could go back for her husband, Mike, and his own son and co-pilot, he was threatened with arrest.
item.dc:creator: Jody Barr, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hurricane Milton is growing stronger as it blows toward Florida's Tampa Bay region
item.description: The National Hurricane Center says Hurricane Milton is intensifying and will likely be a major hurricane before it slams into the storm-ravaged Florida coast, most likely on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: For small cities across Alabama with Haitian populations, Springfield is a cautionary tale
item.description: ENTERPRISE, Ala. (AP) — The transition from the bustling Port-au-Prince, Haiti, to a small Alabama city on the southernmost tip of the Appalachian mountain range was challenging for Sarah Jacques. But over the course of a year, the 22-year-old got used to the quiet and settled in.
item.dc:creator: SAFIYAH RIDDLE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Social Security COLA raise: How much will recipients get in 2025?
item.description: The Social Security Administration is less than two weeks away from announcing its cost of living adjustment (COLA), the annual bump in recipients' payments to help them deal with inflation.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump urges his supporters to deliver victory in his return to scene of first assassination attempt
item.description: BUTLER, Pa. (AP) — Donald Trump returned on Saturday to the Pennsylvania fairgrounds where he was nearly assassinated in July, urging a large crowd to deliver an Election Day victory that he tied to his survival of the shooting.
item.dc:creator: JULIE CARR SMYTH, JILL COLVIN and ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Photos: A visual look at Trump's return to Pennsylvania for a rally at site of assassination attempt
item.description: BUTLER, Pa. (AP) — Thousands of supporters returned to Butler, Pennsylvania, on Saturday to rally around Donald Trump at the same site where a gunman tried to assassinate him in July. Many had lined up as the sun rose for the event billed as a “tribute to the American spirit.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mets use another October rally to score 5 runs in 8th and top Phillies 6-2 in Game 1 of NLDS
item.description: Mark Vientos and Brandon Nimmo keyed another late New York comeback, helping the Mets break through for five runs in the eighth inning against a pair of All-Star relievers as they rallied past the Philadelphia Phillies 6-2 on Saturday in Game 1 of their National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Death toll from Hurricane Helene rises to 227 as grim task of recovering bodies continues
item.description: FRANKFORT, Ky. (AP) — The death toll from Hurricane Helene inched up to 227 on Saturday as the grim task of recovering bodies continued more than a week after the monster storm ravaged the Southeast and killed people in six states. Helene came ashore Sept.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SCHREINER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man poses as woman on dating app to rob at gunpoint in St. Louis
item.description: A St. Louis County man allegedly posed as a woman on dating apps to lure other men into meetups, only to rob them at gunpoint, authorities say.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, NewsNation

item.title: Former New York governor and stepson assaulted during evening walk
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Former New York Gov. David Paterson and his stepson sustained minor injuries when they were assaulted on a Manhattan street by four men and a woman as they went for an evening walk, police said Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Many loathe public speakerphone calls, so why do people do it?
item.description: Few things are as universally reviled as a loud phone conversation infringing on your personal space. (Mosquitoes and taxes, aside.) Doing it on loudspeaker is even more incendiary.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, ABC 4

item.title: Decorated off-duty Atlanta officer allegedly breaks into neighbor's house, is killed when homeowner opens fire
item.description: A decorated Atlanta Police Department officer was shot and killed by a homeowner this week after he allegedly broke into his neighbor's house while off duty.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Child entrepreneur opens pizza shop with Caribbean twist in New York City
item.description: A young entrepreneur is bringing even more Caribbean flavor to New York City, opening a pizza shop with a Caribbean twist at 11 years old.
item.dc:creator: Zhané Caldwell, ABC 4

item.title: Dodgers' Kershaw, Guardians' Lively, Tigers' Mize and Yankees' Stroman are left off ALDS rosters
item.description: Pitchers Clayton Kershaw and Joe Kelly were left off the Los Angeles Dodgers' roster for their NL Division Series against the San Diego Padres that started Saturday. San Diego added right-handers Martín Pérez and Alek Jacob, who were skipped from the Wild Card Series roster against Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Hurricane Helene aftermath poses election hurdles in critical battlegrounds
item.description: Hurricane Helene has thrown up new hurdles for voters and election officials alike in Georgia and North Carolina, threatening disruptions to the voting process in two of the most critical battleground states.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, WGN 9

item.title: Tropical Storm Milton forms in the Gulf, NHC says
item.description: Tropical Depression Fourteen has strengthened into Tropical Storm Milton, according to the National Hurricane Center.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, KRON4

item.title: Obama to campaign for Harris in key swing states, starting with Pennsylvania
item.description: Former President Obama is set to hit the campaign trail for Vice President Harris this month, starting his blitz in the key battleground state of Pennsylvania next week.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Mixed verdict for 3 Memphis officers convicted in Tyre Nichols' fatal beating
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Three former Memphis police officers were convicted Thursday in the 2023 fatal beating of Tyre Nichols, but were acquitted of the harshest charges they faced for a death that sparked national protests and calls for broad changes in policing.
item.dc:creator: ADRIAN SAINZ, KRISTIN M. HALL and JONATHAN MATTISE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Motorized wheelchair stuffed with cocaine seized at Bush airport, CBP said
item.description: EL PASO, Texas (Border Report) -- Unusually large cushions on a motorized wheelchair piqued the interest of officers at George Bush Intercontinental Airport last month in Houston, U.S. Customs and Border Protection said. Their suspicions were right.
item.dc:creator: Fernie Ortiz, Fox 5

item.title: Melania Trump says she supports abortion rights, putting her at odds with the GOP
item.description: Melania Trump has revealed her support for abortion rights ahead of the release of her upcoming memoir. Her stated position exposes a stark contrast with her husband, Republican presidential nominee Donald Trump, on the crucial election issue.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINE FERNANDO, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Helene's flooding swept away 11 workers at a Tennessee factory. Now the state is investigating
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Tennessee state authorities said Wednesday they were investigating the company that owns a plastics factory where 11 workers were swept away by cataclysmic flooding unleashed by Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN MATTISE and CEDAR ATTANASIO, Associated Press, ABC 4
